faq.question: Can I drive in South Korea with my foreign licence?
faq.question_de: Kann ich in Südkorea mit meinem ausländischen Führerschein fahren?
faq.answer: Many visitors can drive with a valid national licence for short stays, but rental companies and police may require an International Driving Permit (IDP). Always confirm before you travel.
faq.answer_de: Viele Besucher dürfen mit gültigem nationalen Führerschein kurzzeitig fahren, Mietwagenfirmen und Polizei verlangen aber oft einen Internationalen Führerschein (IDP). Vor der Reise klären.

faq.question: What are the default speed limits in South Korea?
faq.answer: Default limits depend on road type, but posted signs always override general defaults. Check urban, rural, and motorway limits on the country guide above.
faq.answer_de: Standardlimits hängen vom Straßentyp ab, ausgeschilderte Limits haben immer Vorrang. Urban-, Land- und Autobahn-Limits findest du oben im Länderguide.

faq.question: Where can I verify the latest rules for South Korea?
faq.question_de: Wo kann ich die aktuellen Regeln für Südkorea prüfen?
faq.answer: Use the official sources listed on this site and re-check with government transport or police authorities before driving.
faq.answer_de: Nutze die offiziellen Quellen auf dieser Seite und prüfe vor der Fahrt erneut bei Behörden für Verkehr oder Polizei.

summary: South Korea has modern infrastructure but high traffic density. A unique rule is that motorcycles are mostly banned from highways. Left turns allowed only on green arrow signals.
common_traps: Unprotected left turns are rare; look for arrows.
Speed cameras are everywhere (and navigation apps warn you).

speed_limits.notes: Safe Speed 5030 policy: 50 km/h on main roads, 30 km/h in school zones/residential areas.

alcohol_limit.notes: Strict penalties. 0.03% to 0.08% results in license suspension.

rules.headlights_rules: Must be on in tunnels and at night.
rules.priority_rules: Vehicles inside the roundabout have priority.

tolls.notes: Hi-Pass (electronic) lanes are blue. Cash lanes are common.

rules.parking_rules: Strictly enforced. Look for designated parking lots.

rental_and_idp_notes: IDP is required. Credit card usually needed.
